sourceTitle: CU Committee Report: Generative Artificial Intelligence for Education and Pedagogy
evidenceSnippetOriginal: We currently discourage the use of automatic detection algorithms for academic integrity violations using GAI, given their unreliability and current inability to provide definitive evidence of violations.
evidenceLocator: Section 4: Recommendations for faculty and administration (faculty recommendations)
